free_text: Investigation of the C12(t,a)B11 reactions.
English translation
Electrostatic generator
Solid carbon target was made by evaporating graphite
in vacuum on a glass plate. The thickness was 15 to
25 mu-g/cm2.
Error from the graphic bars. No source of
uncertainty is given.
Figure 2
CH4 or CO2 gas target was used. The pressure was
60 mm Hg. The exit window was sealed with a mica film
with the thickness of 0.13 mg/cm2.
Error from the graphic bars. No source of

Figure 3
A chamber with two semiconductor detectors
was used for the measurements. One, mounted at 90
degr. to the tritium-ion beam, was used as a monitor.
The other was rotated around the target in the angle
range 0-155 degr.
